chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos.605 to 607 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.2829/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.2830/2024 16.04.2026 Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel states that these references may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Office to place a copy hereof in connected references. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Asif
